-- Hoogle documentation, generated by Haddock
-- See Hoogle, http://www.haskell.org/hoogle/


-- | functional spreadsheet programming
--   
--   A functional programming language embedded in a spreadsheet
--   environment.
@package recalc
@version 0.7.9.1

module Recalc.Engine.Core

-- | Spreadsheets are uniquely determined by a resource id and sheet name
type SheetId = (URI, Text)

-- | Row and column (both zero-indexed)
type CellAddr = (Int, Int)
row :: CellAddr -> Int
column :: CellAddr -> Int

-- | Beginning (top left) and end (bottom right) of a range
type CellRange = (CellAddr, CellAddr)


-- | The evaluation strategy is inspired by the paper "Build systems à la
--   carte", it maintains a <a>DocumentStore</a> that tracks types, values
--   and meta data for all cells.
--   
--   The implementation maintains a <a>DocumentStore</a> that tracks types,
--   values and meta data for all cells.
--   
--   References: Andrey Mokhov, Neil Mitchell and Simon Peyton Jones. Build
--   Systems à la Carte. Proceedings of the ACM on Programming Languages,
--   Volume 2, Issue ICFP.
module Recalc.Engine

-- | Spreadsheets are uniquely determined by a resource id and sheet name
type SheetId = (URI, Text)

-- | Represents a general universal resource identifier using its component
--   parts.
--   
--   For example, for the URI
--   
--   <pre>
--   foo://anonymous@www.haskell.org:42/ghc?query#frag
--   </pre>
--   
--   the components are:
data () => URI

-- | A space efficient, packed, unboxed Unicode text type.
data () => Text

-- | Row and column (both zero-indexed)
type CellAddr = (Int, Int)

-- | Beginning (top left) and end (bottom right) of a range
type CellRange = (CellAddr, CellAddr)

-- | The spreadsheet language abstraction
class Language term where {
    type EnvOf term;
    type ErrorOf term;
    type ValueOf term;
}

-- | Compute dependencies of a term
deps :: Language term => term -> Set CellRange
newEnv :: Language term => SheetId -> EnvOf term

-- | All terms can be evaluated in the <a>Fetch</a> context (a dependently
--   typed language is assumed: values and types coincide)
infer :: Language term => term -> Fetch (EnvOf term) (ErrorOf term) (ValueOf term) (ValueOf term)

-- | All values can be inferred
inferValue :: Language term => EnvOf term -> ValueOf term -> Maybe (ValueOf term)

-- | All terms can be evaluated in the <a>Fetch</a> context
eval :: Language term => term -> Fetch (EnvOf term) (ErrorOf term) (ValueOf term) (ValueOf term)

-- | Evaluation of cells can always fail due to invalid formulas or refs
data FetchError err
InvalidFormula :: ParseErrorBundle String Void -> FetchError err
RefError :: FetchError err
OtherError :: err -> FetchError err
errorTitle :: (a -> Text) -> FetchError a -> Text

-- | Typeclass for values that "default-when-absent". For example,
--   <a>Bool</a> when not given should be "the same" as <tt>False</tt>.
--   Used for meta-data only.
class Isn't cell
isn't :: Isn't cell => cell -> Bool

-- | can be merged (à la "missing data kept, null removes it")
class Meta cell
merge :: Meta cell => cell -> cell -> cell

-- | The spreadsheet engine can be queried for re-evaluation of cells
--   (types and values) and volatile results.
data Ix
Cell :: Kind -> SheetId -> CellAddr -> Ix
Volatile :: Ix
type Fetch term a = Fetch (EnvOf term) (ErrorOf term) (ValueOf term) a
type TypeAnnotation dat = Maybe (ValueOf (TermOf dat))
type Engine doc sheet cell term = EngineT doc sheet cell term Identity
type EngineState = EngineState Slow
type EngineT doc sheet cell term f = EngineT Slow doc sheet cell term f

-- | input data can be arbitrary
class Language (TermOf dat) => Input dat where {
    type TermOf dat;
    type MetaOf dat;
}
termOrValueOf :: Input dat => SheetId -> CellAddr -> dat -> Maybe (Parsed (Either (TermOf dat) (ValueOf (TermOf dat))))
metaOf :: Input dat => dat -> MetaOf dat
type Parsed = Either (ParseErrorBundle String Void)

-- | meta changes which don't map to terms/values, do not affect
--   re-computation
type MetaChangesOf dat = [(CellAddr, MetaOf dat)]

-- | validated cells, all changes affect recomputation (deletions, parse
--   errors, new values, new terms)
type ChangesOf dat = ([CellAddr], [(CellAddr, MetaOf dat, ParseErrorBundle String Void)], [(CellAddr, MetaOf dat, ValueOf (TermOf dat))], [(CellAddr, MetaOf dat, TermOf dat)])

-- | recomputing will return new (value, type)s per cell (or an error)
type NewValues dat = [((SheetId, CellAddr), Either (FetchErrorOf (TermOf dat)) (ValueOf (TermOf dat), TypeAnnotation dat))]
runEngineT :: EngineT doc sheet cell term f a -> EngineState doc sheet cell term -> f (a, EngineState doc sheet cell term)
updateMeta :: (Isn't cell, Meta cell, Monad f) => SheetId -> [(CellAddr, cell)] -> EngineT doc sheet cell term f ()
validateCells :: Input dat => SheetId -> [(CellAddr, dat)] -> (MetaChangesOf dat, ChangesOf dat)

-- | recompute new store from validated new inputs
recompute :: forall dat doc sheet f. (Monad f, Show (ValueOf (TermOf dat)), Input dat, Isn't (MetaOf dat)) => SheetId -> ChangesOf dat -> EngineT doc sheet (MetaOf dat) (TermOf dat) f (Either [(SheetId, CellAddr)] (NewValues dat))
type DS doc sheet cell term = DocumentStore doc sheet cell term (ValueOf term) (FetchErrorOf term)
newEngineState :: DependencyMap dm => EngineState dm doc sheet cell term
modifyDocs :: Monad f => (DS doc sheet cell term -> DS doc sheet cell term) -> EngineT dm doc sheet cell term f ()
insertDocument :: URI -> doc -> DocumentStore doc sheet cell term value err -> DocumentStore doc sheet cell term value err
insertSheet :: SheetId -> sheet -> DocumentStore doc sheet cell term value err -> DocumentStore doc sheet cell term value err
deleteSheet :: SheetId -> DocumentStore doc sheet cell term value err -> DocumentStore doc sheet cell term value err
updateDocument :: URI -> (doc -> doc) -> DocumentStore doc sheet cell term value err -> DocumentStore doc sheet cell term value err
updateSheet :: SheetId -> (sheet -> sheet) -> DocumentStore doc sheet cell term value err -> DocumentStore doc sheet cell term value err
fetchType :: SheetId -> CellAddr -> Fetch env err value value
fetchValue :: SheetId -> CellAddr -> Fetch env err value value
getEnv :: Fetch env err value env
localEnv :: (env -> env) -> Fetch env err value a -> Fetch env err value a


module Recalc.Server.Protocol
data SpreadsheetProtocol mode
SpreadsheetProtocol :: (mode :- JsonRpc "open" OpenParams ()) -> (mode :- JsonRpc "save" SaveParams ()) -> (mode :- JsonRpc "close" CloseParams ()) -> (mode :- JsonRpc "setRangeValues" SetRangeValuesParams Cells) -> (mode :- JsonRpc "insertSheet" InsertSheetParams ()) -> (mode :- JsonRpc "removeSheet" RemoveSheetParams ()) -> (mode :- JsonRpc "setWorksheetOrder" SetWorksheetOrderParams ()) -> (mode :- JsonRpc "setWorksheetName" SetWorksheetNameParams ()) -> (mode :- JsonRpc "defineFunction" DefineFunctionParams ()) -> SpreadsheetProtocol mode
[rpcOpen] :: SpreadsheetProtocol mode -> mode :- JsonRpc "open" OpenParams ()
[rpcSave] :: SpreadsheetProtocol mode -> mode :- JsonRpc "save" SaveParams ()
[rpcClose] :: SpreadsheetProtocol mode -> mode :- JsonRpc "close" CloseParams ()
[rpcSetRangeValues] :: SpreadsheetProtocol mode -> mode :- JsonRpc "setRangeValues" SetRangeValuesParams Cells
[rpcInsertSheet] :: SpreadsheetProtocol mode -> mode :- JsonRpc "insertSheet" InsertSheetParams ()
[rpcRemoveSheet] :: SpreadsheetProtocol mode -> mode :- JsonRpc "removeSheet" RemoveSheetParams ()
[rpcSetWorksheetOrder] :: SpreadsheetProtocol mode -> mode :- JsonRpc "setWorksheetOrder" SetWorksheetOrderParams ()
[rpcSetWorksheetName] :: SpreadsheetProtocol mode -> mode :- JsonRpc "setWorksheetName" SetWorksheetNameParams ()
[rpcDefineFunction] :: SpreadsheetProtocol mode -> mode :- JsonRpc "defineFunction" DefineFunctionParams ()
data OpenParams
OpenParams :: URI -> [Text] -> OpenParams
[open'uri] :: OpenParams -> URI
[open'sheetOrder] :: OpenParams -> [Text]
data SaveParams
SaveParams :: URI -> URI -> SaveParams
[save'uri] :: SaveParams -> URI
[save'asUri] :: SaveParams -> URI
newtype CloseParams
CloseParams :: URI -> CloseParams
[close'uri] :: CloseParams -> URI
data SetRangeValuesParams
SetRangeValuesParams :: URI -> Text -> Cells -> SetRangeValuesParams
[setRangeValues'uri] :: SetRangeValuesParams -> URI
[setRangeValues'sheetId] :: SetRangeValuesParams -> Text
[setRangeValues'cells] :: SetRangeValuesParams -> Cells
data InsertSheetParams
InsertSheetParams :: URI -> Int -> Text -> Text -> InsertSheetParams
[insertSheet'uri] :: InsertSheetParams -> URI
[insertSheet'index] :: InsertSheetParams -> Int
[insertSheet'sheetId] :: InsertSheetParams -> Text
[insertSheet'sheetName] :: InsertSheetParams -> Text
data RemoveSheetParams
RemoveSheetParams :: URI -> Text -> RemoveSheetParams
[removeSheet'uri] :: RemoveSheetParams -> URI
[removeSheet'sheetName] :: RemoveSheetParams -> Text
data SetWorksheetOrderParams
SetWorksheetOrderParams :: URI -> Text -> Int -> Int -> SetWorksheetOrderParams
[setWorksheetOrder'uri] :: SetWorksheetOrderParams -> URI
[setWorksheetOrder'sheetId] :: SetWorksheetOrderParams -> Text
[setWorksheetOrder'from] :: SetWorksheetOrderParams -> Int
[setWorksheetOrder'to] :: SetWorksheetOrderParams -> Int
data SetWorksheetNameParams
SetWorksheetNameParams :: URI -> Text -> Text -> SetWorksheetNameParams
[setWorksheetName'uri] :: SetWorksheetNameParams -> URI
[setWorksheetName'sheetName] :: SetWorksheetNameParams -> Text
[setWorksheetName'newName] :: SetWorksheetNameParams -> Text
data DefineFunctionParams
DefineFunctionParams :: URI -> Text -> Text -> [(Text, CellRange)] -> CellRange -> DefineFunctionParams
[defineFunction'uri] :: DefineFunctionParams -> URI
[defineFunction'sheetId] :: DefineFunctionParams -> Text
[defineFunction'description] :: DefineFunctionParams -> Text
[defineFunction'inputs] :: DefineFunctionParams -> [(Text, CellRange)]
[defineFunction'output] :: DefineFunctionParams -> CellRange
data Annotation
Annotation :: Text -> Annotation
[ann'title, ann'message] :: Annotation -> Text

-- | keep errors, warnings for each cell
data CustomData
CustomData :: [Annotation] -> [Annotation] -> [Annotation] -> CustomData
[customData'errors] :: CustomData -> [Annotation]
[customData'warnings] :: CustomData -> [Annotation]
[customData'info] :: CustomData -> [Annotation]

-- | corresponds to ICellData (see:
--   <a>https://univer.ai/typedoc/@univerjs/core/interfaces/ICellData)</a>
data CellData
CellData :: Nullable Value -> Nullable Text -> Nullable Text -> Nullable Text -> Nullable Text -> Nullable CustomData -> CellData

-- | Cell style id or style object
[cellData's] :: CellData -> Nullable Value

-- | Cell original value
[cellData'v] :: CellData -> Nullable Text

-- | Formula
[cellData'f] :: CellData -> Nullable Text

-- | Formula id
[cellData'si] :: CellData -> Nullable Text

-- | Rich text, also a Univer Doc
[cellData'p] :: CellData -> Nullable Text

-- | Custom field
[cellData'custom] :: CellData -> Nullable CustomData
newtype Cells
Cells :: Map (Int, Int) CellData -> Cells

-- | assumes the input list is sorted and that the <tt>repr</tt> function
--   respects the order
quotientOn :: Eq q => (a -> q) -> [a] -> [(q, [a])]
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.OpenParams
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.OpenParams
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.SaveParams
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.SaveParams
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.CloseParams
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.CloseParams
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.InsertSheetParams
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.InsertSheetParams
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.RemoveSheetParams
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.RemoveSheetParams
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.SetWorksheetOrderParams
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.SetWorksheetOrderParams
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.SetWorksheetNameParams
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.SetWorksheetNameParams
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.DefineFunctionParams
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.DefineFunctionParams
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.Annotation
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.Annotation
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Recalc.Server.Protocol.Annotation
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.CustomData
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.CustomData
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.CellData
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.Cells
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.SetRangeValuesParams
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Server.Protocol.SetRangeValuesParams
instance forall k (mode :: k). GHC.Generics.Generic (Recalc.Server.Protocol.SpreadsheetProtocol mode)
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.SetRangeValuesParams
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.Cells
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.Cells
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Server.Protocol.CellData
instance Recalc.Engine.DocumentStore.Isn't Recalc.Server.Protocol.CellData
instance Recalc.Engine.DocumentStore.Meta Recalc.Server.Protocol.CellData
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.CellData
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.CellData
instance Recalc.Engine.DocumentStore.Isn't Recalc.Server.Protocol.CustomData
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.CustomData
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.CustomData
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.Annotation
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.Annotation
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.DefineFunctionParams
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.SetWorksheetNameParams
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.SetWorksheetOrderParams
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.RemoveSheetParams
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.InsertSheetParams
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.CloseParams
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.SaveParams
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Recalc.Server.Protocol.OpenParams


-- | This module implements a reactor pattern for <tt>Recalc</tt>, ensuring
--   asynchronous processing of spreadsheet updates and computations. A
--   single threaded loop listens for JSON-RPC messages and maintains jobs.
--   
--   Jobs are picked up by multiple "worker" threads such that long-running
--   computations do not block messaging.
--   
--   <h3>Example</h3>
--   
--   <pre>
--   type Protocol
--   
--   type Api = ToApi Protocol
--   
--   initialState = ...
--   
--   main :: IO ()
--   main = runHandler <tt>Api initialState $ state -&gt;
--     hoist </tt>Api (<a>runReaderT</a> state) (namedHandlers server)
--    where
--     server :: Protocol (AsServerT (Handler EngineState))
--     server = Protocol { ... }
--   </pre>
module Recalc.Server

-- | handler threads are in IO and have access to the state
type Handler engine = ReaderT (State engine) IO
liftEngine :: State engine a -> Handler engine a
debug :: Show a => String -> a -> Handler engine ()
dumpEngineState :: Show engine => Handler engine ()
scheduleJob :: ReaderT (State engine) IO () -> Handler engine ()

-- | reads lines from stdin and maintains a channel of reactor inputs with
--   new requests, handler threads deal with requests by reading from the
--   request channel.
runHandler :: forall api engine. HasHandler api => engine -> (State engine -> HandlerT api IO) -> IO ()
type Id = Word64
data JsonRpcRequest params
JsonRpcRequest :: String -> Maybe Id -> params -> JsonRpcRequest params
[request'method] :: JsonRpcRequest params -> String
[request'id] :: JsonRpcRequest params -> Maybe Id
[request'params] :: JsonRpcRequest params -> params
pattern JsonRpcNotification :: String -> params -> JsonRpcRequest params
data JsonRpc (sym :: Symbol) (params :: Type) (rsp :: Type)
class HasHandler api
type HandlerT api (m :: Type -> Type)
handle :: forall api. HasHandler api => JsonRpcRequest Value -> Handler api -> Either String (IO ())
hoist :: HasHandler api => (forall x. m x -> n x) -> HandlerT api m -> HandlerT api n

-- | generic modes for protocol datatypes
class GenericMode mode where {
    type mode :- api :: Type;
}
infixl 0 :-
data AsServerT (m :: Type -> Type)
type AsServer = -- | the default server AsServerT IO
data AsApi
type ToApi api' = GToSum (Rep (api' AsApi))

-- | generically converts an <tt>Api (<a>AsServerT</a> m)</tt> to its sum
--   representation <tt>ep0 :<a>|</a> ep1 :<a>|</a> ...</tt>
namedHandlers :: (GenericMode m, Generic (api' m), GSum (Rep (api' m))) => api' m -> GToSum (Rep (api' m))
data (path :: Symbol) :> (a :: Type) :: Type
infixr 4 :>
data a :<|> b
(:<|>) :: a -> b -> (:<|>) a b
infixr 3 :<|>
infixr 3 :<|>

-- | send JSON-RPC message on stdout (locked to prevent interleaving)
sendIO :: ToJSON a => a -> IO ()
data Nullable t
Missing :: Nullable t
Null :: Nullable t
Is :: t -> Nullable t

-- | JSON Instances
aesonOptions :: Options


-- | This module provides builds pretty-printing utility functions and a
--   parser for terms with operators.
--   
--   <h3>Example Usage</h3>
--   
--   <pre>
--   import Recalc.Syntax.Fixity
--   
--   data Op2 = Mul | Div | Add
--   
--   data Term = Num Int | Op Op2 Term Term | ...
--   
--   myOps :: [[Fixity Void Op2]]
--   myOps =
--     [ [Infixl "*" Mul, Infixl "/" Div]
--     , [Infixl "+" Add]
--     ]
--   
--   prettyTerm = pp 0
--     where
--       pp prec =
--         let (left, right, ppOp1, ppRightOp2, ppLeftOp2, ppOp2) = ppHelpers myOps prec
--          in case
--           Num i -&gt; pretty i
--           Op op x y@(OP op' _ _)
--             | op == op', right op -&gt; ppRightOp2 pp op x y
--           Op op x y
--             | left op -&gt; ppLeftOp2 pp op x y
--             | otherwise -&gt; ppOp2 pp op x y
--           ...
--   
--   termP :: Parser Term
--   termP = makeOpsParser
--     (void . symbol)              -- parse operator from operator symbol
--     (numP <a>|</a> parens termP)      -- parse atomic terms and parenthesized one recursively
--     (error "no unary operators") -- skip (since there are no Prefix, or Postfix operators)
--     Op                           -- build term from binary operator
--   </pre>
module Recalc.Syntax.Fixity

-- | Fixity declaration (unary prefix and postfix operators, as well as
--   left-associative, right-associative and non-associative infix
--   operators).
data Fixity op1 op2
Prefix :: String -> op1 -> Fixity op1 op2
Postfix :: String -> op1 -> Fixity op1 op2
Infixl :: String -> op2 -> Fixity op1 op2
Infixr :: String -> op2 -> Fixity op1 op2
Infix :: String -> op2 -> Fixity op1 op2

-- | construct a parser from operator table
makeOpsParser :: MonadPlus f => (String -> f ()) -> f a -> (op1 -> a -> a) -> (op2 -> a -> a -> a) -> [[Fixity op1 op2]] -> f a

-- | pretty-print terms minimally respecting specified operator precedences
--   and associativities
ppHelpers :: (Eq op1, Eq op2) => [[Fixity op1 op2]] -> Int -> (op2 -> Bool, op2 -> Bool, (Int -> t1 -> Doc ann) -> op1 -> t1 -> Doc ann, (Int -> t2 -> Doc ann) -> op2 -> t2 -> t2 -> Doc ann, (Int -> t3 -> Doc ann) -> op2 -> t3 -> t3 -> Doc ann, (Int -> t4 -> Doc ann) -> op2 -> t4 -> t4 -> Doc ann)
sym :: Fixity op1 op2 -> String


-- | Types definitions for a very basic dependently typed lambda calculus
--   based on "A tutorial implementation of a dependently typed lambda
--   calculus".
module Recalc.Syntax.Term
data Mode
Check :: Mode
Infer :: Mode
newtype CaseInsensitive
CaseInsensitive :: Text -> CaseInsensitive
[originalText] :: CaseInsensitive -> Text
caseInsensitive :: CaseInsensitive -> Text
data Name
Global :: !CaseInsensitive -> Name

-- | when passing binder, bound names are converted to locally free ones
Local :: !Maybe CaseInsensitive -> !Int -> Name

-- | same but during quoting
Quote :: !Int -> Name
pat :: Text -> Maybe CaseInsensitive

-- | cell references may be given <tt>[file_name.rc]sheet!C3</tt>,
--   <tt>sheet!C3</tt>, or <tt>C3</tt>; corresponding to
--   <tt>FullySpecified</tt>, <tt>SheetOnly</tt>, and <tt>Unspecified</tt>
--   respectively
data RefInfo
FullySpecified :: RefInfo
SheetOnly :: RefInfo
Unspecified :: RefInfo

-- | types of literals
data Lit
Bool :: Lit
Int :: Lit

-- | values of literals
data LitOf
BoolOf :: !Bool -> LitOf
IntOf :: !Int -> LitOf

-- | a tensor (type) is described by the number of dimensions of each
--   component
data TensorDescriptor
TensorDescriptor :: Term Infer -> [Int] -> TensorDescriptor
[base] :: TensorDescriptor -> Term Infer
[dims] :: TensorDescriptor -> [Int]
data Term (m :: Mode)

-- | inferrable terms are checkable
[Inf] :: !Term Infer -> Term Check

-- | lambda abstraction
[Lam] :: !Maybe CaseInsensitive -> !Term Check -> Term Check

-- | annotated terms <tt>e: t</tt>
[Ann] :: !Term Check -> !Term Infer -> Term Infer

-- | hierarchy of type universes
[Set] :: !Int -> Term Infer

-- | dependent function (Π)
[Pi] :: !Maybe CaseInsensitive -> !Term Check -> !Term Check -> Term Infer

-- | bound variable
[Bound] :: !Int -> Term Infer

-- | free variable
[Free] :: !Name -> Term Infer

-- | cell references
[Ref] :: !(URI, Text) -> RefInfo -> CellRange -> Term Infer

-- | literal types
[Lit] :: !Lit -> Term Infer

-- | literal terms
[LitOf] :: !LitOf -> Term Infer

-- | tensor type (only for quoting)
[Tensor] :: !TensorDescriptor -> Term Infer

-- | tensor value (represented as a multi-dimensional array, only for
--   quoting)
[TensorOf] :: !TensorDescriptor -> !Array (Term Check) -> Term Infer

-- | application
[:$] :: !Term Infer -> !Term Check -> Term Infer
boolOf :: Bool -> Term Infer
intOf :: Int -> Term Infer
lam :: CaseInsensitive -> Term Check -> Term Check
splitApp :: Term Infer -> (Term Infer, [Term Check])
subst :: Int -> Term Infer -> Term m -> Term m
substTensor :: Int -> Term Infer -> TensorDescriptor -> TensorDescriptor
braced :: [Doc ann] -> Doc ann
showExcel26 :: CellAddr -> String
prettyURI :: URI -> Doc ann
prettyURI' :: URI -> Text
escapeUri :: Text -> Doc ann
genFresh :: [CaseInsensitive] -> CaseInsensitive
splitFun :: Term Infer -> ([Term Check], Term Check)
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Syntax.Term.Mode
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Recalc.Syntax.Term.Mode
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Syntax.Term.Name
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Syntax.Term.Name
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Syntax.Term.RefInfo
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Syntax.Term.Lit
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Recalc.Syntax.Term.Lit
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Syntax.Term.LitOf
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Recalc.Syntax.Term.LitOf
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Syntax.Term.TensorDescriptor
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Recalc.Syntax.Term.TensorDescriptor
instance GHC.Show.Show (Recalc.Syntax.Term.Term m)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq (Recalc.Syntax.Term.Term m)
instance Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty (Recalc.Syntax.Term.Term m)
instance Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty Recalc.Syntax.Term.LitOf
instance Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty Recalc.Syntax.Term.Lit
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Recalc.Syntax.Term.Name
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Recalc.Syntax.Term.Name
instance Data.String.IsString Recalc.Syntax.Term.Name
instance Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty Recalc.Syntax.Term.Name
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Recalc.Syntax.Term.CaseInsensitive
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Recalc.Syntax.Term.CaseInsensitive
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Syntax.Term.CaseInsensitive
instance Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty Recalc.Syntax.Term.CaseInsensitive


-- | Simple Megaparsec-based parser for the Term language.
module Recalc.Syntax.Parser

-- | simple parser keeps the <a>SheetId</a> as state
type Parser = ReaderT SheetId (Parsec Void String)

-- | parse an inferrable term
formulaP :: Parser (Term Infer)
keyword :: Parser CaseInsensitive
cellReferenceOrFree :: Parser (Term Infer)

-- | parse (signed) integers
decimal :: Parser Int
parens :: Parser a -> Parser a

-- | read an spreadsheet address of the form column-row (columns are
--   labelled "A..Z, AA..", and rows enumerated)
readExcel :: Text -> Maybe CellAddr
symbol :: String -> Parser String


-- | Implementation of a very simple calculus based on "A tutorial
--   implementation of a dependently typed lambda calculus".
--   
--   This implementation implements the type level hierarchy soundly. It
--   adds type assumptions and type/value assumptions for Boolean values
--   and a few declarations to interact with them.
module Recalc.Semantics
data Decl
Decl :: Value -> Maybe Value -> Decl
[declType] :: Decl -> Value
[declValue] :: Decl -> Maybe Value
type Globals = Map Name Decl
data Env
Env :: SheetId -> Globals -> Env
[sheetId] :: Env -> SheetId
[globals] :: Env -> Globals

-- | values are types
type Type = Value
data SemanticError
TypeMismatch :: Type -> Type -> SemanticError
TypeMismatchPi :: Term Check -> Type -> SemanticError
TypeOfBound :: SemanticError
ExpectedSet :: Term Check -> SemanticError
IllegalApplication :: Type -> SemanticError
IllegalArrayType :: [(CellAddr, Type)] -> SemanticError
UnknownIdentifier :: Name -> SemanticError
UnknownError :: Text -> SemanticError
throwSemanticError :: MonadError (FetchError SemanticError) m => SemanticError -> m a
bindType :: Name -> Value -> Fetch (Term Infer) a -> Fetch (Term Infer) a
deps' :: Term m -> Set CellRange
assertInt :: Value -> Fetch (Term Infer) Int
eval' :: Term m -> Fetch (Term Infer) Value
concatMapM :: Monad m => (a -> m [b]) -> [a] -> m [b]
flattenTensor :: Value -> [Value]
check' :: Int -> Type -> Term Check -> Fetch (Term Infer) ()
infer' :: Int -> Term Infer -> Fetch (Term Infer) Type
inferLiteral :: LitOf -> Type
inferUniverse' :: Int -> Term Check -> Fetch (Term Infer) Int
data Neutral
NFree :: !Name -> Neutral
NRef :: !SheetId -> !CellRange -> Neutral
NApp :: !Neutral -> !Value -> Neutral
data VTensorDescriptor
VTensorDescriptor :: Value -> [Int] -> VTensorDescriptor
data Value
VLam :: !Maybe CaseInsensitive -> !Value -> Fetch (Term Infer) Value -> Value
VSet :: !Int -> Value
VPi :: !Maybe CaseInsensitive -> !Value -> !Value -> Fetch (Term Infer) Value -> Value
VLit :: Lit -> Value
VLitOf :: LitOf -> Value
VTensor :: VTensorDescriptor -> Value
VTensorOf :: VTensorDescriptor -> Array Value -> Value
VNeutral :: !Neutral -> Value
vfree :: Name -> Value
vfun :: Value -> Value -> Value
infixr 9 `vfun`
vapp :: Value -> Value -> Fetch (Term Infer) Value
vlam :: Maybe CaseInsensitive -> (Value -> Value) -> Value
vlams :: [Text] -> ([Value] -> Value) -> Value
vpi :: Maybe CaseInsensitive -> Value -> (Value -> Value) -> Value
vpis :: [(Text, Value)] -> ([Value] -> Value) -> Value
vbool :: Type
vint :: Type
vboolOf :: Bool -> Value
vintOf :: Int -> Value
vtensor :: Value -> [Int] -> Value
vtensorOf :: Value -> [Int] -> Array Value -> Value
cellRangeDescriptor :: Value -> CellRange -> VTensorDescriptor
cellRangeDescriptor' :: Value -> CellRange -> VTensorDescriptor
cellRangeAddrs :: CellRange -> [CellAddr]
quote :: Value -> Term Check
valueP :: Parser Value

-- | treating Boolean values as globals
prelude :: Globals
semanticErrorTitle :: SemanticError -> Text
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Recalc.Semantics.Neutral
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Semantics.SemanticError
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Recalc.Semantics.SemanticError
instance Recalc.Engine.Language.Language (Recalc.Syntax.Term.Term 'Recalc.Syntax.Term.Infer)
instance Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty Recalc.Semantics.SemanticError
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Recalc.Semantics.Value
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Semantics.Value
instance Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty Recalc.Semantics.Value


-- | Provides a few utilities to experiment with the core language to
--   examine outcomes of parsing, type checking and inference, evaluation
--   and sheet recomputation.
module Recalc.Repl
data ExampleData
ExampleData :: Nullable Text -> ExampleData
[exampleData'f, exampleData'v] :: ExampleData -> Nullable Text
type Result = Either (FetchError SemanticError)
uri :: URI
parseFormula :: String -> Result (Term Infer)
parseValue :: String -> Result Value
check :: [(Name, Decl)] -> Type -> Term Check -> Result ()
infer :: [(Name, Decl)] -> Term Infer -> Result Type
eval :: [(Name, Decl)] -> Term m -> Result Value
type EngineState = EngineState () () ExampleData (Term Infer)
newEngineState :: EngineState

-- | run a recomputation of a single spreadsheet
runRecompute :: [(CellAddr, String)] -> EngineState -> (Either [CellAddr] NewValues, EngineState)

-- | run recomputation but only return result
evalRecompute :: [(CellAddr, String)] -> EngineState -> Either [CellAddr] NewValues

-- | <pre>
--   &gt;&gt;&gt; pretty 1 &lt;+&gt; pretty "hello" &lt;+&gt; pretty 1.234
--   1 hello 1.234
--   </pre>
pretty :: Pretty a => a -> Doc ann
instance GHC.Show.Show Recalc.Repl.ExampleData
instance Recalc.Engine.DocumentStore.Isn't Recalc.Repl.ExampleData
instance Recalc.Engine.Input Recalc.Repl.ExampleData
instance (Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty a, Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty b) => Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty (Data.Either.Either a b)
